title: CORE & SPINE
yesterday: Yesterday: Bootcamp — Legs/Hamstrings. Reduce redundant leg volume today.

exs.name: Russian Twists
exs.cue: Feet elevated or grounded, rotate fully side to side, controlled tempo

exs.name: Hanging Supported Full PPT
exs.cue: Hang from bar, posterior pelvic tilt — curl pelvis up toward ribs, full ROM, slow and controlled

exs.name: Stability APT
exs.cue: On stability ball or bench — anterior pelvic tilt, arch the low back, hold and release with control

exs.name: TRUE Kneeling Curl-Downs
exs.cue: Kneeling on pad, feet anchored — hinge back slowly from knees, abs resisting, full ROM down and up

exs.name: Stability Lumbar Extensions
exs.cue: Stability ball under hips/pelvis, extend spine fully, squeeze glutes at top, control the descent

exs.name: Walking Oblique Side Bends
exs.cue: DB in one hand, walk 10m while bending laterally away from the load — full ROM side bend each step

exs.name: Hanging Windshield Wipers
exs.cue: Hang from bar, legs straight or bent, rotate hip-to-hip in full arc — control both directions

exs.name: Triple-Angle Serratus Protractions (Unilateral)
exs.cue: One arm on cable or band — protract scapula fully at each angle: low, mid, high. Keep elbow soft.

exs.name: Kneeling Rollout
exs.cue: Knees on pad, ab wheel arms extended — roll out as far as control allows, pull back with abs, no hip drop
